title: Dalton Defies the King
description: On pages 5–8, dalton defies the king as wapol learns that the Straw Hats are heading for Drum Castle, while Dalton and the villagers face the threat of the old tyrant’s return.
scene: Dalton Defies the King. Wapol learns that the Straw Hats are heading for Drum Castle, while Dalton and the villagers face the threat of the old tyrant’s return. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Now then... according to the reports,

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: It seems the straw hat pirates are headed for drum castle.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: It seems they're looking for that witch, Dr. Kureha.

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: Apparently, she's made the castle her new home during your majesty's absence.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That HAG is living in my castle!?

dialogue.speaker: Kuromarimo
dialogue.text: How long does that traitorous HAG intend to make a fool out of me!

dialogue.speaker: Kuromarimo
dialogue.text: I'll devour that HAG along with those pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: Prepare to leave for the castle at once!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That's as far as you'll go!

dialogue.speaker: Kuromarimo
dialogue.text: I've been cut! I'm going to die!

dialogue.speaker: Kuromarimo
dialogue.text: That's precisely why I came and I'd be glad if you did.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: How dare you harm his majesty...!

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Considering that drum kingdom was formerly renowned for its doctors and medical knowledge.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Yes... speaking of which, come out MD-20!

summary: This part centers on dalton defies the king, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
